<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get details about a specific plugin installation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/partners/plugins/{pluginId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve details about a specific 1NCE OS plugin by it's installation ID.
